name: SearXNG Search
description: SearXNG search plugin with optional local personal proxy server, discovery, and search

enableLocalServer.description: Enable local Node personal proxy server for this plugin

localServerPort.description: Port for local proxy server (0 for auto)

discoveryUrls.description: Comma-separated SearXNG base URLs for discovery probes

backendAutoStart.description: Auto-start embedded backend process when plugin is enabled

backendCommand.description: Executable path for embedded SearXNG backend process

backendArgs.description: Command arguments for embedded backend process

backendHealthPath.description: Health path appended to backendBaseUrl for readiness checks

backendStartupTimeoutMs.description: Max wait for embedded backend readiness

retryCount.description: Retry count for transient HTTP failures
